name: before-submit
description: Pre-submission auditor for academic papers: verify references actually exist (catch AI-hallucinated and retracted citations), check internal faithfulness (numbers match the tables, figures match the prose, no broken citations/refs), check LaTeX formatting/writing/anonymization, and enforce venue-specific rules (page limits, mandatory sections, checklists) for ACL/EMNLP/NAACL/CVPR/ICCV/ECCV/NeurIPS/ICML/ICLR.
